label: Abdomen and Pelvis CT Systematic Review

LC.normal_template: Lung bases are clear. No pleural or pericardial effusion. No suspicious pulmonary nodule.

items.placeholder: Describe — e.g. normal calibre, ectatic, calcified, dissection flap, intramural haematoma

items.item_text: Lower thoracic spine and posterior ribs
items.placeholder: Describe findings or state unremarkable

LB.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Liver and biliary system
LB.normal_template: Normal liver morphology and enhancement. No focal lesion. Normal gallbladder. Normal calibre intrahepatic and common bile ducts.

reveals.placeholder: Size, segment(s), enhancement across phases, washout, capsule

items.placeholder: State calibre in mm, level of any obstruction, presence of stent/stones

PN.normal_template: Normal pancreatic morphology and enhancement. No ductal dilation or focal mass. No peripancreatic fluid or fat stranding.

reveals.placeholder: Size, location, enhancement, ductal communication, vascular involvement

SP.normal_template: Normal splenic size and enhancement. No focal lesion.

AD.normal_template: Normal adrenal morphology bilaterally. No adrenal mass.

items.placeholder: If lesion present: size, unenhanced HU, washout characteristics, otherwise state not applicable
If lesion present: size, unenhanced HU, washout characteristics, otherwise state not applicable

GU.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Kidneys and urinary tract
GU.normal_template: Normal renal size, morphology, and symmetric enhancement bilaterally. No solid mass. No urolithiasis or hydronephrosis. Normal bladder wall thickness and enhancement.

items.placeholder: State size in mm and HU, otherwise not applicable

GI.normal_template: Normal morphology of the stomach and duodenum. Normal calibre small and large bowel without wall thickening. Normal appendix.

items.placeholder: Describe location if obstruction present, otherwise not applicable
Describe content (bowel, fat) and any obstruction or strangulation features, otherwise not applicable
Describe any present, otherwise state none

PR.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Peritoneum and mesentery
PR.normal_template: No ascites, free air, or peritoneal abnormality.

items.placeholder: Describe suspected source if free air present, otherwise not applicable
Describe location, size, drainability if collection present, otherwise not applicable

PV_M.normal_template: Normal size and contours of the prostate and seminal vesicles. No pelvic mass.

options: Focal abnormality — describe in section note

items.placeholder: Describe findings or state unremarkable

PV_F.normal_template: Uterus normal in size and position. No adnexal mass. No free pelvic fluid.

items.placeholder: State thickness if assessable, otherwise not applicable / limited on CT
If lesion present: side, size, attenuation, septations, solid component, otherwise not applicable

RA.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Rectum and anal canal
RA.normal_template: Normal rectal wall thickness. No perirectal mass or fluid collection.

LN.normal_template: No pathologically enlarged lymph nodes by size criteria.

items.placeholder: State station and short-axis size in mm, otherwise not applicable

VS.normal_template: Abdominal aorta normal in calibre without aneurysm or dissection. Visceral arteries patent. Portal, splenic, and superior mesenteric veins patent. IVC and iliac vessels patent.

reveals.placeholder: Maximum diameter, extent, mural thrombus, endoleak if post-repair

MS.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Musculoskeletal and body wall
MS.normal_template: No aggressive osseous lesion. Vertebral body heights and alignment preserved. No body wall mass.

items.placeholder: Describe location and acuity, otherwise state none
Describe relevant findings or state unremarkable

DEV.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Devices and incidentals
DEV.normal_template: No indwelling devices. No clinically significant incidental findings.

items.placeholder: Complete only if present
Complete only if present
Describe location and tip position if present

Describe any other device or foreign material not listed above

items.item_text: Incidental findings to flag (per ACR Incidental Findings recommendations)
items.placeholder: List incidentals warranting follow-up or state none

CMP.section_note_placeholder: Optional notes for Comparison and summary
CMP.normal_template: No prior study available for comparison. No clinically significant findings requiring direct communication.

confirmation_item.item_text: I have actively re-checked all sections and reviewed any prior study available
confirmation_item.note: This confirmation is required before the report can be submitted.

reveals.placeholder: Date and modality of comparison study

items.placeholder: Describe per-finding change vs prior, or state not applicable
State follow-up imaging or clinical recommendation, or state not required
